src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Replace the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity annotation with the new @EnableMethodSecurity annotation required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: The class EnableGlobalMethodSecurity was removed in Spring Security 6, causing a compilation error (cannot find symbol) if not replaced.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Migrate the EntityManagerFactory import from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x / JDK 21 ecosystem), causing a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain beans to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / Spring Boot 3.x API changes.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated and removed in newer Spring Security versions; extending it causes compilation errors or runtime failures in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.before: public static class RestSecurityConfigurationAdapter extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in HttpSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in 6.x; using it causes compilation errors in Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Replace deprecated authorizeRequests with authorizeHttpRequests using lambda DSL.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: authorizeRequests is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in 6.x; using it causes compilation errors in Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurity.ignoring with WebSecurityCustomizer bean.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter.configure(WebSecurity) is deprecated; WebSecurityCustomizer is the required replacement in Spring Security 6.x.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.before: public void configure(WebSecurity web) throws Exception { web.ignoring().antMatchers(...); }
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.after: @Bean public WebSecurityCustomizer webSecurityCustomizer() { return web -> web.ignoring().requestMatchers(...); }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Update session management configuration to use lambda DSL.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: Fluent API methods like .sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(...) are deprecated in favor of lambda-based configuration in Spring Security 6.x.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Update OAuth2 resource server configuration to use lambda DSL.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: Fluent API methods for oauth2ResourceServer are deprecated in favor of lambda-based configuration in Spring Security 6.x.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Replace hasRole with hasAuthority to match constant rename and API preference.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: The constant BASE_USER_ROLE was renamed to BASE_USER_AUTHORITY, and hasAuthority is preferred over hasRole for direct authority matching in newer Spring Security versions.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Add explicit CORS configuration with defaults.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: Spring Security 6.x requires explicit CORS configuration if CORS is used; implicit defaults may not apply as expected without explicit declaration.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Update import statements to use new Spring Security classes.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: Old imports like WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter are no longer available; new imports are required for compilation.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Add new imports for WebExpressionAuthorizationManager and ReferrerPolicyHeaderWriter.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: New classes are required for the updated security configuration DSL.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Rename constant from BASE_USER_ROLE to BASE_USER_AUTHORITY.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: The constant was renamed in the LTI constants class to reflect its use as an authority rather than a role.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Add Customizer import for lambda-based configuration.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: Customizer.withDefaults() is required for explicit CORS configuration in the new DSL.
WebSecurityCustomizer is required for the new web security configuration approach.
@Bean annotation is required for defining SecurityFilterChain and WebSecurityCustomizer beans.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3+).

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions on JDK 21.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with modern Spring Boot.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3+), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Correct JPQL field name casing to match Java property naming conventions.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: JPQL is case-sensitive for identifiers; 'modifiedon' likely fails to resolve if the Java field is 'modifiedOn', causing runtime QuerySyntaxException.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3+), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with modern Spring Boot.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and JDK 21.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with modern Spring Boot.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 21.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/mod.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing 'package javax.persistence does not exist' compile errors.
